'''Geelo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] shipjacker, who was labeled as "the resident Rodian cynic" of the [[Crosstown Bar|Crosstown]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].

He was involved in a salvage attempt on the ''[[Starworm]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
